news.t: Marvelous Marvell Propelling This ETF to Huge Gains
Direxion Delivers Four New 2X Bull Single Stock Leveraged ETFs for High Conviction Stock Traders

holdings.infoBox: MRVU is an equity ETF with a total of 15 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily MRVL Bull 2X ETF (MRVU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Marvell Technology, Inc. (TICKER: MRVL). MRVU was launched on Feb 11, 2026 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Marvelous Marvell Propelling This ETF to Huge Gains
data.text: Some stocks are hot. Others are scorching.

data.title: Direxion Delivers Four New 2X Bull Single Stock Leveraged ETFs for High Conviction Stock Traders
data.text: New York, United States, Feb. 24, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- New ETFs Tied to ASML, BABA, MRVL, and SOFI Bring Direxion's Single Stock Leveraged & Inverse Suite to 55 Fund Offerings
